title: Test-of-restraint mixed addressing; unaddressed agent must PASS
failure_mode: substring 'test' (and 'help') reads as a SPEAK/ACK keyword; unaddressed bot butts in instead of staying silent (FR-018)
invariant: operator meta-commentary ('a great test to see if the rest will stay silent') is not a directive; unaddressed agents PASS
rationale: Same trigger as d-mixed-address-castor-addressed, evaluated as an unaddressed bystander (agent.mention_id does not match the <@...> target). The operator explicitly framed restraint as the test.
